channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Entrance door to Laxfield Court no longer locks, 15th June
item.description:
Communal entrance door to Laxfield Court no longer locks so is always open. This is unsafe and insecure. Please fix (I couldn’t find an appropriate category).
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pownall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain in Barnfield Gardens estate blocked and backing up sewage/waste water, 15th June
item.description:
Photos taken 15th June 2026. Drain is at the entrance to the estate as you come off Wrottesley Road, opposite houses 59-61.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Couple of big potholes and cracks along the dovedale road, 15th June
item.description:
So many potholes and cracks along road and it really need resurfacing. Outside no 9 and two big potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dovedale Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is extremely overgrown, 15th June
item.description:
Grass is extremely overgrown. Has been so for a while. Locals cannot walk in the area because of potential litter and dog waste.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbourne Drive, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are 2 minor potholes at the beginning of close, 15th June
item.description:
There are a series of bigger potholes along the verge of kerb area and need a lots of patching up!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rippersley Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyre, 15th June
item.description:
Left here with torn up tyre. No tax either

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the grass near by 169 widmore road, 15th June
item.description:
There is a dead fox outside. An immunocompromised person lives there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 171, Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household furniture and baby pushchairs, 15th June
item.description:
Fly tipping includes sofas, prams, baby toys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 15th June
item.description:
Untaxed and no MOT just left in car park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Battery Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poorly planned roadworks, 15th June
item.description:
The current roadworks on west end lane have caused huge issues on the traffics . It had caused congestion and confusion on the traffic. Car drivers are trying to use all the side roads via inglewood road. I'm extremely appalled hearing drivers swearing at each other every single today and all this for poorly planned roadworks. Can camden council please investigate this issue and resolve it as soon as possible or at least consider adding temporary traffic lights? People are confused and they dont know which road to follow, additionally all the side roads such as holmdale road should be one way road there isn't enough space for two cars to pass by when you have parked cars on both sides of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 283-285, West End Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: BRANCHES Covering TRAFFIC LIGHTS, 15th June
item.description:
BRANCHES Covering TRAFFIC LIGHTS

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Screws have became loose, 15th June
item.description:
Screws have come loose or removed half way. Potential or serious accident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Radial Path, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria road between Lynton and Donaldson, 15th June
item.description:
More mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria Road South side either side of junction with Honiton, 15th June
item.description:
Dog mess , fast food debris, cans. No sign of any street cleaning. Looks neglected and about of bagged and unbagged dog mess is a health hazard. Residents having to come out and house Victoria, Donaldson and Tennyson Road several times a week. After a year of campaigning we got one don’t allow your dog to mess her sign (and I think that was put up by a resident)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Honiton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post is lying across the pavement, 15th June
item.description:
Lamppost is lying across the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gable Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole on the Road, 15th June
item.description:
There is a hole in the middle of the Road which is dangerous for cars and public and is getting wider and wider

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurel Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This area needs sweeping, 15th June
item.description:
Could you please send a street sweeper here? It looks untidy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deal Porters Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 15th June
item.description:
Bunch of rubbish dumped including a suitcase and shopping trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calcott Walk, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 130-136 victoria road, 15th June
item.description:
Street needs cleaning. Litter. Cans. Dog mess bags under trees . And no action for weeks (despite presence of street cleaner sitting in the wall reading his phone last week but not seen moving)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Sofa
